indicators.name: China Official Statement Tone Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: MFA daily briefings and Xi Jinping speeches — tone toward US, Taiwan, and neighbors
indicators.why_matters: Tone hardening signals policy change 2-4 weeks ahead

indicators.name: US National Security Statement
indicators.what_to_watch: White House, State Department, Pentagon official releases on China and Russia
indicators.why_matters: Policy signals before action — often 1-3 weeks ahead

indicators.name: Russia Strategic Statement
indicators.what_to_watch: Kremlin and MFA Russia statements on NATO, Ukraine, and nuclear posture
indicators.why_matters: Escalation language precedes military moves

indicators.name: NATO Unity Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Joint statements, summit outcomes, member disagreements
indicators.why_matters: Cracks in NATO unity = opportunity signal for adversaries

indicators.name: EU Foreign Policy Move
indicators.what_to_watch: EU Council decisions on sanctions, trade, and geopolitical positioning
indicators.why_matters: EU economic weight makes its moves market-moving

indicators.name: India Strategic Positioning
indicators.what_to_watch: India-China, India-US, India-Russia relations — hedging behavior
indicators.why_matters: India as swing power — which side it leans matters globally

indicators.name: Taiwan Strait Tension Level
indicators.what_to_watch: PLA military activity near Taiwan, US arms sales, diplomatic statements
indicators.why_matters: Taiwan is the highest-risk flashpoint globally

indicators.name: South China Sea Activity
indicators.what_to_watch: Naval incidents, island construction, ASEAN protests, US FON operations
indicators.why_matters: Escalation here affects global shipping and ASEAN stability

indicators.name: Middle East Power Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: Iran nuclear talks, Saudi-Israel normalization, proxy conflict levels
indicators.why_matters: Middle East instability directly affects oil and global inflation

indicators.name: ASEAN Alignment Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: ASEAN summit outcomes, member hedging between US and China
indicators.why_matters: ASEAN alignment shows which power is winning in Southeast Asia

indicators.name: Japan-South Korea Security Move
indicators.what_to_watch: Trilateral US-Japan-South Korea cooperation, North Korea response
indicators.why_matters: Northeast Asia security directly tied to US-China competition

indicators.name: Australia Strategic Posture
indicators.what_to_watch: AUKUS developments, Australia-China trade, Five Eyes signals
indicators.why_matters: Australia is key US ally in Indo-Pacific balance

indicators.name: Coup or Attempted Coup
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty theft from the people — elected government replaced by force

indicators.name: Emergency Powers Declaration
indicators.phi002_significance: Temporary sovereignty transfer that never ends — classic GCSP blocker

indicators.name: Election Manipulation Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Pseudo-democracy — pretends to serve the people while manufacturing consent

indicators.name: Diplomatic Expulsion
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty signal — breakdown in state relationships affecting people

indicators.name: Debt Trap Sovereignty Extraction
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct+Active debt trap — sovereignty theft through finance

indicators.name: Foreign Military Base Negotiation
indicators.phi002_significance: Indirect+Active debt trap — sovereignty traded for security guarantees

indicators.name: International Court or Tribunal Action
indicators.phi002_significance: Accountability signal — law-governed society vs impunity

indicators.name: Targeted Assassination or Political Killing
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty theft through elimination — blocking people from growing freely

indicators.name: AI Capability Breakthrough
indicators.what_to_watch: New AI model releases, benchmark scores, capability jumps from OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Chinese labs
indicators.why_matters: AI capability shifts change military, economic, and intelligence balance

indicators.name: Semiconductor Export Control
indicators.what_to_watch: US BIS export control updates, chip restrictions on China, Dutch ASML decisions
indicators.why_matters: Chip restrictions are the frontline of US-China tech war

indicators.name: Quantum Computing Milestone
indicators.what_to_watch: Government quantum funding, breakthrough papers, qubit count records
indicators.why_matters: Quantum breakthrough breaks current encryption — civilization-level event

indicators.name: Cyber Attack Attribution
indicators.what_to_watch: State-attributed cyber attacks on infrastructure, government, finance
indicators.why_matters: Cyber attacks are precursor to or substitute for kinetic conflict

indicators.name: Space Technology Move
indicators.what_to_watch: Satellite launches, anti-satellite tests, space militarization signals
indicators.why_matters: Space dominance = intelligence, GPS, and military communication dominance

indicators.name: AI Military Integration
indicators.what_to_watch: Pentagon AI programs, Chinese PLA AI announcements, autonomous weapons
indicators.why_matters: AI in military changes speed and nature of conflict

indicators.name: Tech Decoupling Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Supply chain bifurcation, friend-shoring announcements, tech standard battles
indicators.why_matters: Decoupling reshapes global economy into two tech blocs

indicators.name: Surveillance Infrastructure Deployment
indicators.phi002_significance: Rights contraction — surveillance apparatus blocks free thought and movement

indicators.name: Internet Shutdown or Throttling
indicators.phi002_significance: Critical GCSP blocker — cuts access to education, communication, freedom

indicators.name: Cyber Attack on Critical Infrastructure
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality attack through cyber — disrupts people's material foundation

indicators.name: AI Regulation or Weapons Development
indicators.phi002_significance: TECH+POWER cross-talk — who controls AI controls future sovereignty

indicators.name: Digital Rights Restriction
indicators.phi002_significance: EFF territory — rights contraction planned through tech policy

indicators.name: Encryption or Privacy Law Change
indicators.phi002_significance: Indirect sovereignty theft — state access to private communication

indicators.name: Semiconductor or Chip Export Control
indicators.phi002_significance: TECH+POWER cross-talk — technology as geopolitical weapon

indicators.name: Critical Tech Supply Chain Event
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality — who controls tech supply chains controls futures

indicators.name: Space Militarization Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: New sovereignty frontier — space as next theater of rights contraction

indicators.name: Disinformation Technology Deployment
indicators.phi002_significance: TECH+NARRATIVE cross-talk — technology used to manufacture division

indicators.name: Satellite Imagery or Intelligence Restriction
indicators.phi002_significance: Information suppression — hiding ground truth from people

indicators.name: US Federal Reserve Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Fed rate decisions, chair speeches, FOMC minutes
indicators.why_matters: Fed moves ripple through every global market within hours

indicators.name: New Sanctions Package
indicators.what_to_watch: OFAC designations, EU sanctions lists, secondary sanctions threats
indicators.why_matters: Sanctions are financial warfare — direct economic impact

indicators.name: Sanctions Evasion Detection
indicators.what_to_watch: Shell company formations, alternative payment systems, crypto flows
indicators.why_matters: Evasion routes show how targets adapt and survive sanctions

indicators.name: De-dollarization Move
indicators.what_to_watch: Yuan internationalization, BRICS currency talks, SWIFT alternatives
indicators.why_matters: Dollar dominance = US financial power — any erosion matters

indicators.name: Crypto Regulatory Move
indicators.what_to_watch: SEC crypto actions, PBOC digital yuan, EU MiCA implementation
indicators.why_matters: Crypto regulation shapes how sanctions can be evaded or enforced

indicators.name: Oil Price Spike or Drop
indicators.what_to_watch: OPEC production decisions, US strategic reserve moves, Russia oil revenue
indicators.why_matters: Oil price = inflation = political stability worldwide

indicators.name: Trade War Escalation
indicators.what_to_watch: New tariffs, trade restrictions, WTO disputes
indicators.why_matters: Trade war = economic decoupling signal + inflation pressure

indicators.name: IMF or World Bank Conditionality
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct+Passive debt trap — development loans that develop the lender

indicators.name: Sovereign Debt Default Risk
indicators.phi002_significance: Indirect+Passive debt trap — systemic architecture trapping nations

indicators.name: Currency Devaluation or Crisis
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality — currency collapse destroys people's material foundation

indicators.name: Financial Warfare Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Indirect+Active debt trap — using financial system as geopolitical lever

indicators.name: Capital Flight or Oligarch Asset Movement
indicators.phi002_significance: NETWORK+FINANCE cross-talk — elites extracting before crisis hits people

indicators.name: Asset Seizure or Confiscation
indicators.phi002_significance: Cui Bono — who benefits from the seizure? Who loses sovereignty?

indicators.name: Crypto Sanctions Evasion or Regulation
indicators.phi002_significance: NETWORK+FINANCE cross-talk — new financial dark zones opening or closing

indicators.name: Austerity Policy Implementation
indicators.phi002_significance: Critical GCSP blocker — cutting education/healthcare = blocking human maturity

indicators.name: Illicit Financial Flow Detection
indicators.phi002_significance: NETWORK+FINANCE cross-talk — dark money enabling power without accountability

indicators.name: Trade War or Economic Coercion
indicators.phi002_significance: Indirect+Active debt trap — economic pressure as sovereignty lever

indicators.name: Development Finance Trap Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct+Active debt trap — Belt and Road sovereignty extraction pattern

indicators.name: Large Scale Military Exercise
indicators.what_to_watch: PLA exercises near Taiwan, NATO exercises near Russia, US Indo-Pacific drills
indicators.why_matters: Exercises signal intent and test readiness — often precede escalation

indicators.name: Arms Sale Announcement
indicators.what_to_watch: US arms sales to Taiwan, Japan, Ukraine — Russian and Chinese arms deals
indicators.why_matters: Arms sales show alliance commitments and shift military balance

indicators.name: Nuclear Posture Change
indicators.what_to_watch: Nuclear doctrine updates, warhead count changes, delivery system tests
indicators.why_matters: Nuclear posture shifts are the highest-stakes signals

indicators.name: Active Conflict Intensity
indicators.what_to_watch: Ukraine frontline changes, Middle East conflict levels, Asia flashpoints
indicators.why_matters: Active conflicts draw in great powers and reshape alliances

indicators.name: Military Budget Announcement
indicators.what_to_watch: Defense budget increases — especially China, US, NATO members
indicators.why_matters: Budget reveals long-term military intent

indicators.name: Troop Deployment to Foreign Soil
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty signal — whose military is where tells us who controls territory

indicators.name: Naval Chokepoint Activity
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality — chokepoints control energy and trade for millions

indicators.name: Nuclear Posture Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Existential GCSP threat — nuclear signals affect all human futures

indicators.name: Ceasefire Violation or Collapse
indicators.phi002_significance: People's sovereignty signal — peace agreements broken affect civilians most

indicators.name: Proxy War Escalation
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty theft through proxies — people fight other nations' wars

indicators.name: Mercenary or Private Military Force
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty signal — unaccountable military force outside democratic control

indicators.name: Siege or Blockade Implementation
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct physical GCSP blocker — people's access to food/medicine cut

indicators.name: Drone Strike or Targeted Strike Campaign
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality — targeted killing outside declared war zones

indicators.name: Weapons Transfer or Arms Deal
indicators.phi002_significance: Cui Bono — who benefits from arming which side of which conflict

indicators.name: Ethnic or Civilian Targeting Allegation
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct GCSP destruction — people blocked from growing by being killed

indicators.name: Military Alliance Activation or Shift
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty signal — alliances redrawn change who protects whom

indicators.name: State Media Tone Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: Global Times, People's Daily, RT, VOA — sudden tone or framing changes
indicators.why_matters: State media shifts signal policy changes before official announcements

indicators.name: Coordinated Influence Operation
indicators.what_to_watch: Detected bot networks, coordinated inauthentic behavior, platform takedowns
indicators.why_matters: Influence ops precede or accompany physical operations

indicators.name: Disinformation Campaign Detection
indicators.what_to_watch: Fact-checker findings, platform removals, false narrative spread patterns
indicators.why_matters: Disinformation shapes public opinion before policy can respond

indicators.name: Think Tank Consensus Shift
indicators.what_to_watch: RAND, CSIS, Brookings, IISS major papers — new framing of great power competition
indicators.why_matters: Think tanks shape policy 6-18 months ahead

indicators.name: Global Media Coverage Spike
indicators.what_to_watch: Sudden surge in coverage of specific topic across multiple outlets
indicators.why_matters: Media spike = attention shift = political pressure building

indicators.name: Sectarian Violence Incitement
indicators.phi002_significance: Sectarian Trap — manufactured division blocks people from collective growth

indicators.name: Historical Revisionism Campaign
indicators.phi002_significance: PHI-002 attack — erasing historical truth blocks society from learning

indicators.name: Opposition Delegitimization Campaign
indicators.phi002_significance: Pseudo-democracy — eliminating opposition while claiming to serve people

indicators.name: Refugee or Migrant Crisis Narrative
indicators.phi002_significance: NARRATIVE+RESOURCE cross-talk — displacement used to manufacture fear

indicators.name: Media Freedom Crackdown
indicators.phi002_significance: Education for growth blocked — free press is GCSP infrastructure

indicators.name: Nationalist Mobilization Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: NARRATIVE+POWER cross-talk — nationalism manufactured to justify expansion

indicators.name: Economic Scapegoating Campaign
indicators.phi002_significance: Sectarian Trap — economic frustration redirected toward division not change

indicators.name: False Flag or Staged Incident Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Deception detection — pretense used to justify rights contraction

indicators.name: Religious Extremism Amplification
indicators.phi002_significance: Traditions weaponized to suppress fundamental rights

indicators.name: Far-Right or Far-Left Extremist Rise
indicators.phi002_significance: Democratic erosion signal — extremes normalize rights contraction

indicators.name: Disinformation Campaign Detection
indicators.phi002_significance: PHI-002 attack — manufactured reality blocks people from true understanding

indicators.name: New Alliance Formation
indicators.what_to_watch: New security pacts, minilaterals (AUKUS, QUAD expansion), partnership upgrades
indicators.why_matters: New alliances reshape balance of power

indicators.name: Proxy Actor Activation
indicators.what_to_watch: Hezbollah, Houthis, Wagner-type groups — sudden activation or new funding
indicators.why_matters: Proxy activation = state actor testing limits without direct involvement

indicators.name: Non-State Actor Movement
indicators.what_to_watch: Major NGO position shifts, international court filings, civil society mobilization
indicators.why_matters: Non-state actors shape norms and create political pressure

indicators.name: Elite Personal Network Signal
indicators.what_to_watch: Davos, Bilderberg, G7/G20 side meetings — who meets whom privately
indicators.why_matters: Elite meetings precede policy announcements by weeks

indicators.name: Hidden Financial Network Detection
indicators.what_to_watch: Leaked documents, ICIJ investigations, shell company registrations
indicators.why_matters: Hidden money flows reveal real alliances and intentions

indicators.name: Shell Company Network Exposure
indicators.phi002_significance: Dark money enabling power without accountability — GCSP blockade

indicators.name: Money Laundering Network
indicators.phi002_significance: NETWORK+FINANCE cross-talk — criminal finance sustaining authoritarian power

indicators.name: Organized Crime State Nexus
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty captured by criminal networks — people have no real government

indicators.name: Drug Trade Financing Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Criminal finance sustaining violence that blocks GCSP development

indicators.name: Terrorism or Militant Group Financing
indicators.phi002_significance: Dark financial flows enabling violence against civilian populations

indicators.name: Oligarch Wealth Movement
indicators.phi002_significance: Cui Bono — who extracted wealth while the people suffered?

indicators.name: Corruption Investigation Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Law-governed society signal — corruption vs accountability

indicators.name: Kleptocracy or State Capture Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Pseudo-democracy — institutions captured mean no real people's government

indicators.name: Human Trafficking Network
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct GCSP destruction — humans commodified, unable to grow freely

indicators.name: Cryptocurrency Dark Pool or Evasion
indicators.phi002_significance: NETWORK+FINANCE cross-talk — new dark financial zones

indicators.name: Intelligence Agency or Spy Network Exposure
indicators.phi002_significance: Hidden sovereignty operations affecting people without their knowledge

indicators.name: Rare Earth Export Restriction
indicators.what_to_watch: China rare earth export quotas, new restrictions on gallium, germanium, lithium
indicators.why_matters: China controls 60-80% of rare earth processing — restrictions hit tech globally

indicators.name: Energy Supply Disruption
indicators.what_to_watch: Pipeline disruptions, LNG supply changes, energy weaponization signals
indicators.why_matters: Energy is the most direct lever of geopolitical pressure

indicators.name: Food Security Signal

indicators.name: Supply Chain Rerouting
indicators.what_to_watch: Friend-shoring announcements, new manufacturing hub formations, port activity shifts

indicators.name: Critical Mineral Competition
indicators.what_to_watch: Lithium, cobalt, nickel deals — who secures what mining rights where
indicators.why_matters: Critical minerals = battery tech = EV and military supply chain control

indicators.name: Water Security Crisis
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical floor — no water = no GCSP foundation possible

indicators.name: Food Crisis or Famine Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical floor — food security is the most basic GCSP prerequisite

indicators.name: Critical Mineral Supply Disruption
indicators.phi002_significance: RESOURCE+TECH cross-talk — who controls minerals controls energy future

indicators.name: Climate-Driven Displacement
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality — climate forces movement, blocking stable GCSP foundation

indicators.name: Agricultural Land Acquisition
indicators.phi002_significance: Indirect+Active debt trap — land as sovereignty resource extraction

indicators.name: Debt for Resources Swap
indicators.phi002_significance: Direct+Active debt trap — resources mortgaged for debt relief

indicators.name: Energy Poverty Escalation
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical floor — energy access is GCSP foundation

indicators.name: Pipeline or Energy Infrastructure Dispute
indicators.phi002_significance: Physical reality — energy corridors determine who has power

indicators.name: Maritime Resource Conflict
indicators.phi002_significance: Sovereignty + resource cross-talk — maritime rights = economic future

indicators.name: Grain or Food Export Restriction
indicators.phi002_significance: Food as weapon — RESOURCE+POWER cross-talk affecting millions

indicators.name: Mining Nationalization or Rights Dispute
indicators.phi002_significance: Cui Bono — resource sovereignty reclaimed or extracted?

indicators.name: Environmental Destruction Signal
indicators.phi002_significance: Safe environment is first GCSP pillar — destruction blocks all others

indicators.name: Nuclear Energy or Weapons Proliferation
indicators.phi002_significance: Dual-use signal — energy or weapons? Sovereignty implications either way
